---
title: "Protocols"
---

Interactive protocol calculators — set your sample count and volumes scale automatically. Use **🖨 Print / Save as PDF** on any protocol for a bench copy.

## Available protocols

| Protocol | Type | Source |
|----------|------|--------|
| [In situ Hi-C](hic-protocol.qmd) | Chromatin conformation | Rao et al. 2014 |
| [CUT&RUN](cnr-protocol.qmd) | Chromatin profiling | Skene et al. 2018 |
| [2D ENS differentiation](ens-2d-protocol.qmd) | Cell biology | Barber et al. 2019 |

## Adding a new protocol

Give Claude the source (PDF, `.docx`, or paste the methods section) and say **"make a QMD for this protocol."** Output goes in `protocols/`. Then add a row to the table above.
